title: Income arriving from three sources
subtitle: A short visualisation for building the felt picture of diversified income.
excerpt: A five-minute visualisation practice for when the idea of multiple income streams is still abstract. The scene: three separate income notifications arriving in one week.
sourceNotes: Original to homemade.education. Creative visualisation applied to income diversification.

content.text: A five-minute visualisation from Day 30 of the MONEY program. The scene: three separate income notifications arriving in one week, each from a different source.
Sit quietly. Close your eyes. Take a slow breath in and let it go.

It is Tuesday morning. You open your email and see a payment notification. This one is from a product or service you built some time ago. It sold last night. You didn't do anything yesterday evening except watch something and go to bed.
Now picture Thursday. A different notification. An invoice you sent to a client last week has been paid. This one is direct work, paid on time, cleanly.
Saturday. A third notification. A small amount, an affiliate payment or a rental income or interest from savings. Something that moved without you this week.
Picture opening the banking app at the end of the week. Three deposits. Three different sources. The total is real. Let it sit for a moment.
Notice what the body does with that picture. Then open your eyes.
Original to homemade.education. Creative visualisation applied to income diversification.
